customer-target-desc: (Optional) Indicate a different customer for the new document
doc-recurring-document-line-error: The lines could not be added to the document
doc-recurring-generate-ok: The document has been generated successfully.
document-note: Observations that are copied to the new document
empty-and-patterns: Empty will use the default value. Check available patterns. Here.
empty-use-default: Empty will use the default value
first-date-desc: Blank will be calculated from the start date
first-pct-desc: Part proporcional del total, per al primer document
firstdate-can-not-be-null: If selected: Force date of the first document, this cannot be empty
quantity-type-desc: Number of times that the Term Type is applied
reference-description-empty: The reference and description are empty. You must enter one of them.
supplier-target-desc: (Optional) Indicate a different supplier for the new document
